tools.name: cargo.cargoGetRouteFromDateProductCodeByOriginAndDestinationGet
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all possible flights (both direct and connecting) between two airports on a given date. Routes are available for today and up to days in the future.

tools.name: cargo.cargoShipmentTrackingByAwbPrefixAndAwbNumberGet
tools.description: With this tracking service you can easily retrieve your shipment or flight status information.

tools.name: operations.operationsFlightstatusArrivalsByAirportCodeAndFromDateTimeGet
tools.description: Status of all arrivals at a given airport up to 4 hours from the provided date time.

tools.name: operations.operationsFlightstatusByFlightNumberAndDateGet
tools.description: Status of a particular flight (boarding, delayed, etc.).

tools.name: operations.operationsFlightstatusDeparturesByAirportCodeAndFromDateTimeGet
tools.description: Status of all departures from a given airport up to 4 hours from the provided date time.

tools.name: operations.operationsFlightstatusRouteDateByOriginAndDestinationGet
tools.description: Status of flights between a given origin and destination on a given date.

tools.name: operations.operationsSchedulesFromDateTimeByOriginAndDestinationGet
tools.description: Scheduled flights between given airports on a given date.

tools.name: referenceData.referencesAircraftByAircraftCodeGet
tools.description: List all aircraft types or one specific aircraft type.

tools.name: referenceData.referencesAirlinesByAirlineCodeGet
tools.description: List all airlines or one specific airline.

tools.name: referenceData.referencesAirportsByAirportCodeGet
tools.description: List all airports or one specific airport. All airports response is very large. It is possible to request the response in a specific language.

tools.name: referenceData.referencesAirportsNearestByLatitudeAndLongitudeGet
tools.description: List the 5 closest airports to the given latitude and longitude, irrespective of the radius of the reference point.

tools.name: referenceData.referencesCitiesByCityCodeGet
tools.description: List all cities or one specific city. It is possible to request the response in a specific language.

tools.name: referenceData.referencesCountriesByCountryCodeGet
tools.description: List all countries or one specific country. It is possible to request the response in a specific language.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
